name: TikTok Creator Rewards Program
description: Earn revenue directly from TikTok based on views, engagement, and watch time. Available to creators who meet follower and view thresholds.

name: YouTube Partner Program
description: Monetise your YouTube channel through ad revenue, channel memberships, and Super Thanks. The baseline monetisation program for video creators.

name: Instagram Reels Play Bonus
description: Earn bonuses based on Reels performance. Meta invites eligible creators — keep your account active and growing to qualify.

name: Snap AR Creator Fund
description: Snap funds developers and creators building augmented reality lenses. Strong fit for gaming and art creators with an interactive edge.

name: Etsy Up & Running Grant
description: Etsy periodically awards micro-grants to small creative businesses selling handmade, vintage, or digital products. Great for art, fashion, and food creators with a product line.
requirements: Based in US, UK, Canada, or Australia

name: Amazon Influencer Program
description: Curate a storefront of recommended products and earn commissions on qualifying purchases. Works across all creator niches with an engaged audience.
requirements: Active social media account with engagement
YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook presence

name: Goldman Sachs 10,000 Small Businesses
description: A practical business education program paired with grant opportunities for small business owners. Cohort-based curriculum with access to capital upon completion.
requirements: In business for at least 2 years

name: Shopify Compass Grants
description: Shopify periodically awards grants and resources to creators building commerce businesses. Access to merchant resources, mentorship, and growth funding.
requirements: At least 6 months of sales history
Products in fashion, food, or art categories

name: National Business Plan Competition
description: Annual competition for early-stage businesses. Submit your pitch deck and business plan for a chance at a significant cash award and national exposure.
deadline: Annual (submissions open January, finals in April)
requirements: Viable business with revenue or strong traction

name: Y Combinator
description: The world's top startup accelerator. YC invests $500K for 7% equity and provides 3 months of intensive mentorship, ending with Demo Day in front of top investors.
requirements: Full-time commitment from at least one founder

name: Techstars Creator Economy Accelerator
description: A 13-week accelerator for creator economy startups backed by major media partners. Provides mentorship from industry veterans and direct investor access.
requirements: Willing to relocate for program duration

name: a16z Creator Economy Fund
description: Andreessen Horowitz's dedicated fund for creator economy companies. Invests in tools, platforms, and infrastructure enabling the next generation of creators.
requirements: Pitch deck and financial model required

name: FJ Labs
description: One of the most active marketplace investors globally. FJ Labs invests in marketplaces, platforms, and creator-monetisation startups at pre-seed and seed.
requirements: Some early traction or pilot data

name: Backstage Capital
description: Backstage Capital invests in underrepresented founders across fashion, wellness, fitness, and creative industries. Strong track record with lifestyle and creator brands.
requirements: Underrepresented founder (woman, person of color, or LGBTQ+)
Consumer product or platform in creative space

name: digitalundivided BIG Innovation Awards
description: Annual grant for Black and Latina women entrepreneurs building scalable tech-enabled businesses. Strong track record for gaming, fitness tech, and digital media founders.
